label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Signal is a privacy-first messaging application developed by the Signal Foundation (nonprofit). Collects minimal data with strong end-to-end encryption by default. No tracking, no third-party data sharing, no advertising. Does not build user profiles. Published transparency reports on government requests. One of the most privacy-protective messaging platforms available. Strong signal (pun intended) of commitment to privacy with open-source architecture.
